---
name: Physics question or critique
about: Question, critique, or extension of the theoretical framework
title: "[Physics] "
labels: physics
---

## Type

- [ ] Clarification question about an existing derivation
- [ ] Critique of a derivation or assumption
- [ ] Proposed extension or new relation
- [ ] Suspected inconsistency between papers

## Reference

Which paper and section/equation? (e.g. "P2, Eq. (10)" or "P1, Sec. 4.3")

## Description

(Describe the question or proposed change. LaTeX is supported.)

## Expected impact on the simulator

- [ ] No code change needed (pure clarification)
- [ ] Changes a derived constant — list which one(s)
- [ ] Changes the ODE system — describe how
- [ ] Adds a new bridge or posterior quantity
- [ ] Other (explain)

## Parameter classification

If this introduces a new quantity, which class does it belong to?

- [ ] Model axiom (π, e, integer dimensions, fixed-point τ values)
- [ ] Model-endogenous (derived from axioms with no fitted input)
- [ ] Bridge / unit conversion (CODATA values, etc.)
- [ ] Posterior diagnostic / validation target
